title: Destructure an Ecto changeset in function head
prompt: Rewrite: `def error_count(changeset) do if changeset.valid? do 0 else length(changeset.errors) end end`. Use two function heads — one matching `%Ecto.Changeset{valid?: true}` returning `0`, and one matching `%Ecto.Changeset{errors: errors}` returning `length(errors)`. Output a complete `defmodule MyApp.ChangesetUtils do ... end`.
tier_rationale: Straight struct-destructure refactor. Sonnet often leaves `changeset.errors` as field access in the body.
